_comment: SceneSmith Studio v7 — Built-in vocabulary library. Add keywords here and rebuild.
powerBoosters: real life, true to life, lifelike
depth of field mastery, perfect bokeh
cinematic colour grading, professional colour science
physically accurate lighting, real-world light behaviour

signatureTechniques.dual-light: warm amber practical light against cold blue-grey environment, dual light temperature contrast between subject and background
signatureTechniques.sss: subsurface scattering skin render, light passes through ear cartilage and fingertips creating warm reddish translucency, photorealistic skin physics
signatureTechniques.particles: dust motes suspended mid-air, individually visible, backlit, volumetric atmosphere, physically accurate particle dynamics
signatureTechniques.practical: all illumination from visible practical sources in scene — candles, fire, oil lamps, window light — no artificial fill, no light without visible source
signatureTechniques.wind: individual hair strand separation, wind-blown directional movement, flyaway strands catching light, realistic hair physics simulation
signatureTechniques.frozen: high-speed frozen moment, motion blur on periphery only, sharp subject at point of impact, suspended mid-motion with physically accurate dynamics
